stimulus: Lakota Nation citizen John Running Bear produced and directed the documentary Mitákuye Oyásʼin , which vividly chronicles Lakota traditions and ceremonies. Telling Lakota stories through documentary film is ______blank choice because two of the most respected documentary filmmakers of the past fifty years were also Lakota citizens.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice B is correct because "a fitting" means appropriate or suitable, matching the reasoning that two respected Lakota documentary filmmakers make the medium an appropriate choice. Choices A, C, and D all suggest a poor or random fit, contradicting the supporting reason.
